name: GOCL Corporation Limited
summary: GOCL Corporation Limited engages in energetics and explosives, and property development businesses in India and internationally. Its Energetics and Explosives segment manufactures and markets corrosion resistant explobond clad plates, explobond electrical transition joints, explobond structural transition joints, and tubular transition joints, as well as explosively hardened CMS crossings and shovel teeth; and energetic materials, pyro devices, flexi severance cord systems, training devices, signaling devices, detonators for grenade, special purpose detonators, and squibs/ignitors for defense and space applications. This segment also provides detonators, detonating relays, detonating cords, raydets, seismic products, and accessories for underground coal mines; and manufactures and markets cartridge explosives and bulk explosives for mining and infrastructure projects. The company's Property Development segment develops properties in Bengaluru and Hyderabad comprise of IT/ITeS, office space, retail segment, educational institutions, hotel, hospital, and residential. The company also exports its products to 20 countries. The company was formerly known as GULF OIL Corporation Limited and changed its name to GOCL Corporation Limited in October 2015. GOCL Corporation Limited was incorporated in 1961 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
